description:
By default, the SELinux boolean logwatch_can_network_connect_mail is disabled. If this setting is enabled, it should be disabled. To disable the logwatch_can_network_connect_mail SELinux boolean, run the following command: 
$ sudo setsebool -P logwatch_can_network_connect_mail off
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the logwatch_can_network_connect_mail SELinux boolean is disabled: 
$ getsebool logwatch_can_network_connect_mail
If properly configured, the output should show the following: logwatch_can_network_connect_mail --> off
title: Disable the logwatch_can_network_connect_mail SELinux Boolean
